name: e18e-module-replacements
title: e18e Module Replacements
description: Search and browse e18e's curated list of modern npm package replacements.
author: tm.wrnr

commands.name: search-module-replacements
commands.title: Search Module Replacements
commands.subtitle: e18e Module Replacements
commands.description: Find module replacements for your codebase.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
